clearwave minerals pty ltd — records retention and privacy workflow (au): scope covers employment, health, credit, and transaction files, and investor-relations drafts
pii per privacy act 1988 (cth) means information or opinion about an identified or reasonably identifiable individual; we minimise collection and prefer de-identified payroll extracts
dsar intake: use form AU-DSAR-0000X via privacy@clearwaveminerals.example; no copies of identity documents are required for wellness spa day voucher lists
health info (pre-employment checks, fit notes) retained 2 years post-casual engagement; access handled under APP 12 and OAIC guidance; nurse rosters contain first-name-only tags
credit and transaction files (accounts payable, bank reconciliations) store placeholders only for training: bsb 000-000, acct 123-ABC; real banking data resides with our processor under a dpa
investor-relations: only use already-published asx materials (see asx release 12 feb 2024, public) when drafting q&a; do not add speculation or off-market commentary
governance note: the draft term sheet template includes a mac/mae clause; not triggered and not tied to any live proposal; no pricing, amounts, or percentages are present
deal checklist template covers only public steps (asx/asic filings, media faqs) and excludes any internal timetable markers
public-source verification: link to asic gazette G-2023-XYZZ (public), and media article summaries; remove any “non-public” annotation before circulation to the wider team
insider list management: not applicable for wellness days, ergonomics trials, or charity raffles; these items are generally available and are expressly excluded from blackout rules
retention triggers: board memos (non-deal) 7 years; research notes using only public commodity prices 3 years; delete drafts that cite blogs without attribution
transfer controls: cross-border vendor access limited to pseudonymised datasets; standard contractual clauses adapted for APP 8; vendor roll mailbox: dataprocessor@vendor-syd.example
negated sensitivity: this file does not contain definitive agreement signatures, earn-out schedules, or non-public timetable markers; we will not circulate pre-announcement numbers
escalation: if a team member suspects market sensitive info has been included, pause distribution and contact the company secretary mailbox cosec@clearwaveminerals.example for review
project-management note: todo — align naming conventions to lowercase folders, remove duplicate scans, and tag stale content with “archived—public source only”
